parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id,
  a.start_datetime,
  a.end_datetime,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (a.end_datetime - a.start_datetime)) / 60)::int AS duration_min,
  a.status,
  a.cancellation_reason,
  (a.quote_id IS NOT NULL)           AS has_quote,
  (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sesiones_clinicas sc3 WHERE sc3.appointment_id = a.id)) AS has_session,
  DATE_TRUNC($9::text, a.start_datetime)::date AS periodo,
  COALESCE(pat.name, 'Sin paciente')   AS patient_name,
  COALESCE(pat.phone_number, '')        AS patient_phone,
  COALESCE(doc.name, 'Sin asignar')    AS doctor_name,
  COALESCE(cs.name, 'Sin calendario')  AS calendar_name,
  (
    SELECT sc2.name
    FROM appointment_service_catalog asc2
    JOIN service_catalog sc2 ON sc2.id = asc2.service_id
    WHERE asc2.appointment_id = a.id
    ORDER BY sc2.name
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS service_name
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN users pat ON pat.id = a.patient_id
LEFT JOIN users doc ON doc.id = a.assignee_id
LEFT JOIN calendar_sources cs ON cs.id = a.calendar_source_id
WHERE a.start_datetime::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND ($3::uuid IS NULL OR a.assignee_id = $3::uuid)
  AND ($4::text IS NULL OR a.status = $4::text)
  AND ($5::bigint IS NULL OR a.calendar_source_id = $5::bigint)
  AND (
    $6::integer IS NULL
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM appointment_service_catalog asc3
      WHERE asc3.appointment_id = a.id AND asc3.service_id = $6::integer
    )
  )
  AND ($7::text IS NULL OR ($7 = 'true' AND a.quote_id IS NOT NULL) OR ($7 = 'false' AND a.quote_id IS NULL))
  AND ($8::text IS NULL OR ($8 = 'true' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sesiones_clinicas sc4 WHERE sc4.appointment_id = a.id)) OR ($8 = 'false' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sesiones_clinicas sc5 WHERE sc5.appointment_id = a.id)))
ORDER BY a.start_datetime DESC

additionalFields.queryParams:
={{ [
  $input.first().json.query?.date_from,
  $input.first().json.query?.date_to,
  $input.first().json.query?.doctor_id || null,
  ($input.first().json.query?.status && $input.first().json.query.status !== 'all') ? $input.first().json.query.status : null,
  $input.first().json.query?.calendar_id ? Number($input.first().json.query.calendar_id) : null,
  $input.first().json.query?.service_id ? Number($input.first().json.query.service_id) : null,
  ($input.first().json.query?.has_quote && $input.first().json.query.has_quote !== 'all') ? $input.first().json.query.has_quote : null,
  ($input.first().json.query?.has_session && $input.first().json.query.has_session !== 'all') ? $input.first().json.query.has_session : null,
  $input.first().json.query?.group_by || 'day'
] }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id,
  a.start_datetime,
  COALESCE(u_pat.name, 'Sin paciente') AS patient_name,
  COALESCE(u_pat.phone_number, '') AS phone_number,
  COALESCE(doc.name, 'Sin asignar') AS doctor_name,
  COALESCE(cs.name, 'Sin consultorio') AS calendar_name,
  a.cancellation_reason,
  (
    SELECT sc2.name
    FROM appointment_service_catalog asc2
    JOIN service_catalog sc2 ON sc2.id = asc2.service_id
    WHERE asc2.appointment_id = a.id
    ORDER BY sc2.name
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS service_name
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN users u_pat ON u_pat.id = a.patient_id
LEFT JOIN users doc ON doc.id = a.assignee_id
LEFT JOIN calendar_sources cs ON cs.id = a.calendar_source_id
WHERE a.start_datetime::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND a.status = 'cancelled'
  AND ($3::uuid IS NULL OR a.assignee_id = $3::uuid)
  AND ($4::bigint IS NULL OR a.calendar_source_id = $4::bigint)
  AND ($5::text IS NULL OR a.cancellation_reason = $5::text)
ORDER BY a.start_datetime DESC
